headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace reports 15% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 15% increase in customer acquisition indicates strong organic growth and improved market penetration for Orevar Marketplace.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
